prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: isolated in-game train sprite source for chroma key removal
Primary request: Create a single detailed N700S-inspired Shinkansen train sprite for an isometric pixel-art railway simulator.
Subject: white high-speed Shinkansen train with thin blue stripe, long segmented cars, rounded nose, roof panels, pantographs, dark windows, subtle pixel highlights. No logos.
Style/medium: crisp 2D isometric pixel-art sprite, late-1990s Japanese railway management game, readable at small size, polished.
Composition/framing: isolated train angled from lower-left nose to upper-right tail, centered with generous padding.
Background requirement: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background only. The background must be one uniform magenta color with no gradients, no shadows, no lighting variation, no texture, no floor plane.
Constraints: no checkerboard, no text, no logos, no watermark, no scene background, no platform, no rails, no cast shadow, do not use #ff00ff in the train.
